use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION AND ANGINA PECTORIS

indications.text:
CARDIZEM CD is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination
with other antihypertensive medications.
CARDIZEM CD is indicated for the management of chronic stable angina and angina due to coronary
artery spasm.
